_note: LAYER-3 — OpenSeaMap seamarks overlay. Owned by LAYER. Public ODbL raster tile service (tiles.openseamap.org); augments the displayed chart without becoming chart data or chart portrayal (see docs/proposals/interfaces/layer-manifest-v1.md). Toggled via index.html's generic data-layer checkbox handler — no dedicated JS needed. Default OFF (internet-dependent live tiles, like helm-chart-online-fill) so the offline chart stack stays the baseline.
